raw_consumer_statement: I contacted AMEX on several occasions : XX/XX/XXXX ( exact date unknown ), XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX. Each time, I requested to cancel my card to prevent further purchases. Despite this, a purchase was made each month, and I received a different excuse each time. One representative mentioned that a " hard block '' was needed and that the previous rep hadn't done it, so they did. The following month, when I was charged again, they claimed that recurring merchant charges needed to be marked as well. It was one excuse after another. In my XXXX years, I have never been so frustrated that I felt compelled to file a complaint. The incompetence is staggering. Does AMEX not properly train their employees?
